mxCell.value: * There will be fields and tables that do not reflect a direct column in the datasets for the reason that the ERD is normalized for system use while the datasets are made to reflect existing professional formats.

* Built from ICTO and
OUR masterlist
* Can refer to an office
or a college

* Built from ICTO and
College masterlist
* Can refer to an office
or a college
* Built from program curriculum and course syllabus per college
